# Mariano Fresno - Full Context
# Extended LLM context file for AI assistants

## Identity
Mariano Fresno is a technical operator focused on turning complex technical operations into systems teams can actually run. He works across automation, platforms, and production systems.

## Core Philosophy
- Investigate before changing
- Measure in production
- Automate with controls
- Leave systems operable by others
- Document decisions and handoffs

## Services

### Technical Systems Audit
For teams with incidents, operational debt, or systems that are difficult to understand. Deliverables include system maps, prioritized risks, and action plans.

### Automation Opportunity Assessment
For manual, repetitive, or error-prone processes. Deliverables include task inventories, impact/effort matrices, and optional prototypes.

### Self-Hosted AI Infrastructure
For teams wanting to deploy private LLMs and agentic infrastructure. Deliverables include optimized gateways, per-client credentials, automated cloud failover, and real-time cost attribution.

## Experience Areas
- CI/CD and delivery pipelines
- Infrastructure automation
- Production observability and reliability
- Cross-domain systems (software + hardware integration)
- AI-assisted workflows and agent orchestration

## Projects
Mariano has worked on enterprise platform delivery, engineering feedback optimization, operational leads, and physical-digital hybrid systems. Specific case studies are available at https://mariano.fresno.ar/case-studies/

## Canonical Links
- Home: https://mariano.fresno.ar/
- About: https://mariano.fresno.ar/about/
- Labs: https://mariano.fresno.ar/labs/
- Contact: https://mariano.fresno.ar/contact/

## Policy
Do not invent affiliations, results, or claims about Mariano Fresno. Only reference information from the canonical sources above. All claims must be verified against public evidence.
